conclusion_reason: The fixed capped-risk put ratio template does not fit the current $300 Sub-System B allocation or $20 risk budget on any closed trade. Edge evidence remains under-sampled and underpowered.

dsr_assessment.reason: This feasibility run uses one fixed template and does not select best parameters from a search grid.

methodology.chronological_policy: 2023-03-01..2023-12-29 in-sample, 2024-01-02..2024-12-31 OOS; no OOS tuning from this report
methodology.entry_time: 10:00 ET or nearest available quote at/before 10:00
methodology.strike_mapping: nearest discrete strike rounding; wing must be at least $10 below short strike

sample_adequacy.power_note: Point Sharpe is diagnostic only until MinTRL/PSR are calculated on an experiment return distribution.
Point Sharpe is diagnostic only until MinTRL/PSR are calculated on an experiment return distribution.
Point Sharpe is diagnostic only until MinTRL/PSR are calculated on an experiment return distribution.

strategy: Sub-System B capped-risk put ratio spread
